raw_yaml:
attack_technique: T1053.005
display_name: Scheduled Task
atomic_tests:
- name: Create Scheduled Task
  description: |
    Create a scheduled task for persistence
  supported_platforms: [windows]
  executor:
    command: |
      schtasks /create /tn test /tr calc.exe /sc daily
    name: command_prompt
- name: At Job
  description: |
    Create an at job
  supported_platforms: [linux, macos]
  executor:
    command: |
      at now + 1 minute <<< '/bin/sh -c whoami'
    name: sh
